answers.note: Upper trough located within southern Manchuria region.
Jet axis passes through northern Korean Peninsula region.
Jet core strength over northern Korean Peninsula is strong as indicated by >100 knots isotachs.
Jet axis over northern Korean Peninsula approximately oriented west-east.
Jet axis associated with southern Korean Peninsula is positioned west relative to that region.
Jet axis near southern Korean Peninsula oriented west-east.
Jet core strength over northern East China Sea is moderate based on isotach values.
Subtropical jet strength over northern East China Sea is moderate as isotach values around 75 knots.
Diffluent flow over western Japan region is strong indicated by isodensity and flow patterns.
Jet axis runs through eastern offshore Japan area.
Jet core strength east offshore Japan is strong indicated by >100 knots isotachs.
Jet axis east offshore Japan oriented west to east.
Polar jet strength north of Tibetan Plateau is weak based on lower isotach values.

Polar jet strength north of Tibet plateau is weak based on isotach indications below 60 knots.

124~130E)."},{"question_id":"stage2_kp_north_jet_core_strength","answer":"moderate","note":"The isotach wind speed in the northern Korean region is moderate compared to Manchuria."},{"question_id":"stage2_kp_north_jet_axis_orientation","answer":"W-E","note":"Jet axis orientation over northern Korean Peninsula is 124~130E)."},{"question_id":"stage2_kp_south_jet_axis_orientation","answer":"W-E","note":"Jet axis orientation across southern Korean Peninsula is 120~128E)."},{"question_id":"stage2_ecs_north_subtropical_jet_axis_strength","answer":"moderate","note":"The subtropical jet over East China Sea north is of moderate answers.note: The jet axis is directly over the southern Manchuria area (41~47N, 120~130E).
The isotach values (black lines with wind speed in knots) indicate a strong jet core over this region.
The jet axis over southern Manchuria runs roughly west-east.
The jet axis is passing over northern Korean Peninsula (37~40N, 124~130E).
The isotach wind speed in the northern Korean region is moderate compared to Manchuria.
Jet axis orientation over northern Korean Peninsula is west-east.
Jet axis passes through southern Korean Peninsula area (33~37N, 124~130E).
Jet axis orientation across southern Korean Peninsula is west-east.
The upper ridge is positioned on the western side of the East China Sea northern sector (28~34N, 120~128E).
The subtropical jet over East China Sea north is of moderate strength.
Jet axis runs directly over western Japan (31~38N, 130~138E).
Jet axis in western Japan is oriented west-east.
The jet axis is located offshore east of Japan (30~40N, 140~150E).
Jet core strength offshore eastern Japan is moderate.
Jet axis offshore east Japan oriented west-east.
Upper trough is located on the eastern side offshore Japan in the specified region.
